matched_hypotheses.evidence: WRF advances a small-step MU delta after small_step_prep, then forms MUTS = MUT + MU. The local path was feeding the full physical perturbation basis back into MUTS across acoustic substeps, collapsing c1h*muts+c2h near zero at the failing cell.
The acoustic core now returns mu on the small-step delta basis as muts-mut, and the operational carry reconstructs mu_total from the fixed base plus that delta.
WRF keeps theta mass coupling as muts*t_1 - mut*t_2 in small_step_prep and adds t_save*mut during small_step_finish. That algebra was left unchanged.
No WRF denominator clamp was found in small_step_finish; the fix keeps the denominator physical by correcting mass-basis algebra.

wrf_references.small_step_prep_rk1: /mnt/data/canairy_meteo/artifacts/wrf_src/WRF/dyn_em/module_small_step_em.F:128-191 sets MU_1=MU_2, MUTS=MUB+MU_2, MU_SAVE=MU_2, then MU_2=0 for RK1
wrf_references.small_step_prep_later_rk: /mnt/data/canairy_meteo/artifacts/wrf_src/WRF/dyn_em/module_small_step_em.F:194-216 sets MUTS=MUB+MU_1, MU_SAVE=MU_2, then MU_2=MU_1-MU_2 for later RK stages
wrf_references.mu_update: /mnt/data/canairy_meteo/artifacts/wrf_src/WRF/dyn_em/module_small_step_em.F:1102-1108 updates MU, MUDF, MUTS, and MUAVE
wrf_references.theta_decouple: /mnt/data/canairy_meteo/artifacts/wrf_src/WRF/dyn_em/module_small_step_em.F:408-423 divides by c1h*muts+c2h without a clamp
wrf_references.solve_order: /mnt/data/canairy_meteo/artifacts/wrf_src/WRF/dyn_em/solve_em.F:1220-1284 calls small_step_prep before the small_steps loop; /mnt/data/canairy_meteo/artifacts/wrf_src/WRF/dyn_em/solve_em.F:1423-1880 runs small_steps; /mnt/data/canairy_meteo/artifacts/wrf_src/WRF/dyn_em/solve_em.F:1901-1918 calls small_step_finish after the loop

local_changes_crosschecked.src/gpuwrf/dynamics/mu_t_advance.py: advance_mu_t_wrf now derives mu_work_old from muts-mut, forms muts_i=mut+mu_work_new, and computes muave on the same delta basis.
local_changes_crosschecked.src/gpuwrf/dynamics/core/acoustic.py: acoustic_substep_core now exposes core mu as advanced.muts-state.mut so wrappers carry the small-step delta basis.
local_changes_crosschecked.src/gpuwrf/runtime/operational_mode.py: _with_save_family resets muts to mu_base and muave to zero at stage prep; _carry_from_acoustic_core reconstructs physical mu_total from base plus acoustic.muts-acoustic.mut.
